Lacina also noted that superhero movies the [[alt-right]] has objected to have performed well in conservative parts of the United States.<ref name=":6" /> After ''[[The Marvels]]'' debuted in 2023 to a record low opening for the MCU, ''[[Forbes]]'' published an article on the film's anti-'woke' backlash.<ref name="forbesMarvels">{{Cite web |last=Murray |first=Conor |title='The Marvels' Faces Anti-'Woke' Backlash After Box Office Flop—Echoing 'Captain Marvel' Attacks |url=https://www.forbes.com/sites/conormurray/2023/11/13/the-marvels-faces-anti-woke-backlash-after-box-office-flop-echoing-captain-marvel-attacks/ |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231203191004/https://www.forbes.com/sites/conormurray/2023/11/13/the-marvels-faces-anti-woke-backlash-after-box-office-flop-echoing-captain-marvel-attacks/ |archive-date=December 3, 2023 |access-date=2023-11-30 |website=Forbes |language=en}}</ref> The article quoted film industry analyst David A. Gross as saying "female-powered entertainment is enjoying extraordinary success right now, but audiences are not embracing these stories".

''[[Barbie (film)|Barbie]]'' released to 2023's largest [[opening weekend]] as well as the largest ever opening weekend for a female director.<ref name=":32">{{Cite magazine |date=2022-11-01 |title=Go Woke, Go Broke? Barbie's Opening Weekend Sales Smash Expectations |url=https://newrepublic.com/post/174553/go-woke-go-broke-barbie-breaks-box-office-records-opening-weekend |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230725093425/https://newrepublic.com/post/174553/go-woke-go-broke-barbie-breaks-box-office-records-opening-weekend |archive-date=July 25, 2023 |access-date=2023-07-25 |magazine=[[The New Republic]] |issn=0028-6583}}</ref> ''Barbie''{{'}}s feminist themes and inclusion of a [[Hari Nef|transgender actress]] triggered backlash from some conservatives, who argued that the film's overt messages made it less entertaining.<ref>{{Cite web |date=July 24, 2023 |title=C'mon Barbie, Let's Go Argue About Politics |url=https://www.seattletimes.com/nation-world/cmon-barbie-lets-go-argue-about-politics/ |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230726035743/https://www.seattletimes.com/nation-world/cmon-barbie-lets-go-argue-about-politics/ |archive-date=July 26, 2023 |access-date=2023-07-26 |work=[[The Seattle Times]]}}</ref> ''Barbie'' would go on to gross over $1.4 billion and a positive critical reception.<ref name="DeadlineWknd3">{{cite news |last=D'Alessandro |first=Anthony |date=August 6, 2023 |title=2023 Domestic Box Office Surges Past $6 Billion This Weekend Due To 'Barbie', 'Oppenheimer', 'Turtles' & 'Meg 2' As Strikes Continue – Sunday Update |url=https://deadline.com/2023/08/box-office-barbie-oppenheimer-meg-2-teenage-mutant-ninja-turtles-1235454860/ |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230805151123/https://deadline.com/2023/08/box-office-barbie-oppenheimer-meg-2-teenage-mutant-ninja-turtles-1235454860/ |archive-date=August 5, 2023 |access-date=August 6, 2023 |website=[[Deadline Hollywood]]}}</ref>

=== Target ===
{{Main|2023 Target Pride Month merchandise backlash}}

The American retailer [[Target Corporation|Target]] released its annual [[LGBT pride]] merchandise collection in May 2023, which sparked a boycott from American conservatives, after viral posts by [[Gays Against Groomers]] and other social media accounts falsely claimed that the company was marketing "tuck-friendly" swimsuits to minors.<ref name="AP">{{cite web |date=May 25, 2023 |title=Target's Pride collection features 'tuck-friendly' swimsuits for adults, not kids |url=https://apnews.com/article/fact-check-target-swimsuits-transgender-pride-collection-892500330955 |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230601145522/https://apnews.com/article/fact-check-target-swimsuits-transgender-pride-collection-892500330955 |archive-date=June 1, 2023 |access-date=June 2, 2023 |website=[[Associated Press]]}}</ref> According to [[Reuters]], these swimsuits, which are designed to "tuck male genitalia", were sold only in the women's section.<ref>{{Cite news |date=2023-05-24 |title=Fact Check-Target's 'tuck-friendly' swimsuits are for adults, not children |url=https://www.reuters.com/article/factcheck-target-pride-idUSL1N37L2CE |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20231030024642/https://www.reuters.com/article/factcheck-target-pride-idUSL1N37L2CE |archive-date=October 30, 2023 |access-date=2023-10-23 |work=Reuters |language=en}}</ref> The company's stock price decreased by over 10% following the release of the products, and the company has been the focus of scrutiny from several [[GOP]] politicians.<ref>{{Cite web |last=Meyersohn |first=Nathaniel |date=2023-07-13 |title=Why Republican lawmakers are going after Target |url=https://www.cnn.com/2023/07/13/business/target-diversity-tom-cotton/index.html |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230720042337/https://www.cnn.com/2023/07/13/business/target-diversity-tom-cotton/index.html |archive-date=July 20, 2023 |access-date=2023-07-20 |publisher=CNN Business |language=en}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web |last=Gaskins |first=Kayla |date=2023-06-06 |title=Target shares continue to tumble amid culture wars controversy |url=https://krcrtv.com/news/nation-world/target-shares-continue-to-tumble-amid-culture-wars-controversy-retail-retailor-lgbtq-pride-month-merchandise-rollout-boycotts-shoppers-shopping-store-economic-struggles-tuck-friendly-swimsuits-transgender-customers |url-status=live |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20230720043841/https://krcrtv.com/news/nation-world/target-shares-continue-to-tumble-amid-culture-wars-controversy-retail-retailor-lgbtq-pride-month-merchandise-rollout-boycotts-shoppers-shopping-store-economic-struggles-tuck-friendly-swimsuits-transgender-customers |archive-date=July 20, 2023 |access-date=2023-07-20 |publisher=[[KRCR-TV]] |language=en}}</ref>
